summary: READ-ONLY static code-diff review for Kotlin Android APK (AATE) V5.0.6303. Cannot run/build locally (GitHub Actions only). Verified all 12 requested items via grep/sed. All fixes for MFE wiring (5 callers) and BlueChip constants/watchlist expansion are in place and structurally correct.

verification_results.peakPnlPct_field_declared_and_updated: PASS — All 5 files declare `var peakPnlPct: Double = 0.0` (BlueChip:174, Quality:192, Manipulated:108, ShitCoin:226, Express:166) and update via `if (pnlPct > pos/ride.peakPnlPct) ... = pnlPct` (BlueChip:561, Quality:590, Manipulated:517, ShitCoin:1790, Express:759)
verification_results.V3JournalRecorder_recordMfe_gate: PASS — V3JournalRecorder.kt ~L273-282 still gates `PipelineHealthCollector.recordMfe(layer, peakSane, pnlPctLearn)` and `MFE_RUNNER_GIVEBACK` label behind `if (peakSane > 0.0)`; sanitizer clamps NaN/Inf/>5000/<0
verification_results.BlueChip_constants: PASS — BASE_POSITION_SOL=0.20 (L66), MAX_POSITION_SOL=1.00 (L67), TAKE_PROFIT_MATURE=80.0 (L79), MAX_HOLD_MINUTES=480 (L85), coerceIn floor 0.04 at L1072 (`positionSol.coerceIn(0.04, MAX_POSITION_SOL)`)
verification_results.SolanaBlueChipWatchlist_size: PASS — 91 `BlueChip(` entries in WATCHLIST list (≥80 requested, was 21). List closes cleanly at L183 with `)` and `byMint` associateBy at L186 is intact
verification_results.no_missed_recordClose_callers: PASS — Full grep across app/src/main/kotlin returned these V3JournalRecorder.recordClose callers: BlueChip/Quality/Manipulated/ShitCoin/ShitCoinExpress/Moonshot (all pass peakGainPct), plus CashGenerationAI.kt:1562 (TREASURY — omits peakGainPct, ACCEPTABLE per request), CyclicTradeEngine.kt:1067 (CYCLIC — omits, ACCEPTABLE), BotService.kt:4555 (GHOST_PURGE — omits, ACCEPTABLE). No lab/LlmLabTrader.kt file present in repo. No unexpected omissions.
verification_results.watchlist_syntax_clean: PASS — WATCHLIST list closes with `    )` at L183, followed by lazy `byMint` map and `statusLine()`. No trailing-comma/unclosed-paren issues. Kotlin allows trailing comma before `)`.
verification_results.ReportingHub_clipboardSafeText: PASS — Defined in ReportingHub.kt:222, referenced by PipelineHealthActivity.kt:347 and ErrorLogActivity.kt:199 (matches ~343 / ~193 stated in request).

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 targeted V3JournalRecorder.recordClose call sites now correctly forward peakGainPct, matching the already-correct MoonshotTraderAI reference (line 1163).
The sanitization in V3JournalRecorder (NaN/Inf/>5000/<0 → clamp) is defensively correct — will not crash on garbage peak values.

SolanaBlueChipWatchlist expanded 21→91 entries. Note: several mint strings (e.g., BLZEwzR2..., YvVWNs4..., XVjTFnHR...) appear synthetic/placeholder-shaped; if these are made-up addresses the on-chain scanner will simply never match them (fail-open). Not a compilation issue but worth operator review for authenticity.

TREASURY (CashGenerationAI), CYCLIC (CyclicTradeEngine), GHOST_PURGE (BotService) intentionally omit peakGainPct → default 0.0 → recordMfe gate suppresses them. Confirmed acceptable per request. If MFE telemetry for TREASURY/CYCLIC is ever desired, the peak-tracking field would need to be added to those layers first.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kotlin Android APK repo at /app/lifecycle_apk. NO local build/run — CI-only via GitHub Actions. All future testing here is static code review via grep/sed/view_file. V5.0.6303 fixes for MFE wiring + BlueChip parameter bump are structurally verified and consistent with MoonshotTraderAI's already-correct reference implementation.
rca_of_the_issue: Bug 1 RCA (confirmed): V3JournalRecorder.recordClose has peakGainPct default 0.0; recordMfe/MFE_RUNNER_GIVEBACK are gated by `if (peakSane > 0.0)`. 5 of 6 lane traders never passed the arg → MFE telemetry silently zero-fed for 5/6 lanes. Fix wires `pos.peakPnlPct` (or `ride.peakPnlPct` for Express) into all 5 callers. Bug 2 RCA (confirmed): BlueChip sizing/target/hold constants were meme-lane defaults, not durable-asset defaults, and watchlist was tiny. Bumped to BASE 0.20 / MAX 1.00 / TP_MATURE 80% / MAX_HOLD 480min, floor 0.04, watchlist 91 mints.
